name: Spicy Chicken Tacos
instructions: Season chicken with taco seasoning and olive oil.
Cook chicken in a skillet over medium heat until fully cooked (about 10-12 minutes).
Warm tortillas in a dry pan or microwave.
Shred or slice the cooked chicken.
Assemble tacos: place chicken on tortillas, top with chopped onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.
